tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Full-text search across all saved notes. Returns up to `limit` matches ranked by relevance, each with the note id, title, and a matching snippet. Use this before create_note to avoid duplicates.

query_text.description: Words or phrases to look for. Plain text, not a regular expression.

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

include_archived.description: Set to true to also search notes that have been archived.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note and return its id. Fails if a note with the same title already exists; search first when unsure.

title.description: Short human-readable title, unique across the notebook.

body_markdown.description: The note content as Markdown. May be empty for a placeholder note.

tags.description: Zero or more tag names to attach; unknown tags are created on the fly.

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Replace the title, body, or tags of an existing note. Only the fields provided are changed; omitted fields keep their current value.

note_id.description: Id of the note to change, as returned by search_notes or create_note.

title.description: New title. Omit to keep the current title.

body_markdown.description: New Markdown content. Omit to keep the current body.

sort_order.description: Where the note appears in list views after the update.

tools.name: archive_note
tools.description: Move a note to the archive so it stops appearing in default searches. Archiving is reversible; nothing is deleted.

note_id.description: Id of the note to archive.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List every tag in the notebook with the number of notes attached to each. Takes no arguments.
